meta_title: For Students: marketing automation to Solve no portfolio (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to marketing automation and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Marketing Automation to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Overcome the 'no portfolio' trap by building a marketing automation engine. A high-impact, intermediate guide using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: To overcome the 'no portfolio' hurdle, build a high-utility marketing automation tool that solves a real business problem. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative implementation, you create a complex, working system that demonstrates engineering maturity and technical depth to future employers.
content.intro:
The blank screen of a portfolio is the silent killer of engineering careers. You've spent hours on tutorials, yet you lack the 'battle-tested' proof that you can ship production-grade software. This isn't just about code; it's about demonstrating value to hiring managers who are tired of seeing generic To-Do apps.

Today, we pivot. We are building a marketing automation system that automates lead nurturing—a project that mimics real-world SaaS infrastructure. By integrating Antigravity for rapid prototyping and Claude Code for deep-dive logic, you will transform from a student into an AI-augmented builder who ships.

steps.title: Define the Automation Logic
steps.description: Architect a system that monitors a data source (like a CSV or API) and triggers personalized email drafts via an LLM.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a Python-based automation engine that monitors a JSON input stream and routes data to an OpenAI-compatible endpoint for content generation.

steps.title: Build the Data Ingestion Layer
steps.description: Create a robust ingestion service that cleans raw lead data before it hits your automation engine.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a robust data ingestion module that parses incoming CSV leads, performs schema validation, and handles missing fields gracefully.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement data validation logic for lead ingestion'

steps.title: Integrate LLM Personalization
steps.description: Connect your engine to an LLM to generate context-aware marketing copy based on lead profiles.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a prompt engineering module that takes lead data and produces a professional, personalized outreach message using a system prompt.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Integrate OpenAI API with custom system instructions for email generation'

steps.title: Implement Workflow Orchestration
steps.description: Use Claude Code to wrap your logic in a state-machine that ensures tasks are executed in the correct sequence.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a state-machine orchestrator that manages the flow from lead extraction to content generation and final output delivery.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Refactor into a state-machine pattern for better error recovery'

steps.title: Deploy and Validate
steps.description: Deploy your engine to a local testing environment to verify it handles concurrency and empty inputs without crashing.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a test suite that simulates 50 concurrent leads to verify the scalability and stability of the automation pipeline.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Write and execute integration tests for the full pipeline'

pro_tips: Always wrap your LLM calls in a retry logic with exponential backoff to handle rate limits in production.
Use structured outputs (JSON mode) in your LLM calls to ensure the automation engine can parse the response reliably.
Include a 'Human-in-the-loop' flag in your architecture so users can review AI-generated content before it is sent.
Document your system architecture with a high-level diagram; recruiters value the ability to explain systems over just writing code.
Add logging middleware to track the latency of each step; performance optimization is a key differentiator in intermediate roles.
content.next_steps: Once your automation engine is functional, deploy it to a public GitHub repository with a comprehensive README.md explaining the 'Why' behind your architectural decisions, then link it prominently on your LinkedIn and portfolio site.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for the perfect project to fall into your lap. You have the tools, the guide, and the capability to build something that actually matters. Your future as a high-value engineer begins the moment you commit your first line of production-ready code. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
